name: OLED C3 65" 4K Smart TV
description: 65-inch OLED evo panel with α9 AI Processor Gen6. Dolby Vision IQ and Dolby Atmos. HDMI 2.1 ports support 4K 120Hz gaming. G-Sync and FreeSync Premium Pro compatible. Perfect blacks with self-lit pixels. webOS 23 smart platform with built-in Google Assistant and Alexa.

name: QN90C Neo QLED 65" 4K
description: Neo QLED with Quantum Mini LEDs for precise local dimming. 4K 144Hz refresh rate with Anti-Reflection screen coating. Object Tracking Sound+ with 60W output. Gaming Hub with cloud gaming. Tizen OS smart platform.

name: X90L 65" 4K BRAVIA XR
description: BRAVIA XR with Cognitive Processor XR for human-like picture and sound processing. Full Array LED with XR Contrast Booster 10. HDMI 2.1 optimized for PS5. Google TV built-in. Dolby Vision and Atmos support.

name: 65" QLED 4K Q6 Series
description: QLED Quantum Dot technology with 60Hz refresh rate. Dolby Vision HDR and DTS Virtual X audio. Google TV smart platform with hands-free voice control. Best value 65-inch QLED for budget-conscious buyers.

name: 65" U8K Mini-LED ULED
description: Mini-LED with 1500 local dimming zones for superior contrast. 144Hz refresh rate with Dolby Vision and IMAX Enhanced certification. AMD FreeSync Premium for gaming. Google TV smart platform. Punches well above its price class.

name: Alpha 7 IV Full-Frame Mirrorless
description: 33MP BSI-CMOS full-frame sensor with 10fps continuous burst shooting. 4K60 video with S-Cinetone color science. 5-axis in-body image stabilization. 759-point hybrid autofocus with real-time tracking. Dual card slots and weather-sealed magnesium alloy body.

name: EOS R6 Mark II Full-Frame
description: 40MP full-frame CMOS with DIGIC X processor. Up to 40fps electronic shutter burst. 4K60 RAW video recording. Subject detection AF for people animals and vehicles. Weather sealed body with dual card slots.

name: X100VI Compact Fixed Lens
description: 40MP X-Trans CMOS 5 HR sensor with 6.2K video capability. In-body image stabilization with 6-stop compensation. Classic 23mm f/2 fixed lens. Iconic film simulations including Provia and Velvia. Built-in 3-stop variable ND filter. Most coveted camera of 2024.

name: Z5 II Full-Frame Mirrorless
description: 24.5MP BSI-CMOS sensor with EXPEED 7 processor. 14fps burst with pre-release capture. 4K60 video with N-Log. In-body stabilization. Subject detection AF. Dual card slots. Weather sealed. Best entry-level full-frame mirrorless.

name: OM-5 Micro Four Thirds
description: 20.4MP Live MOS sensor. IP53 weather splash and dustproof rated. Cold proof to -10 degrees Celsius. 5-axis 7.5EV image stabilization. 4K60 video. Handheld high-resolution shot mode produces 80MP images. Most rugged compact system camera.

name: Dyson V15 Detect Absolute
description: Laser Detect technology illuminates microscopic dust on hard floors. Whole-machine HEPA filtration captures 99.99% of particles. 60-minute runtime on lowest setting. LCD screen shows real-time particle count. Hair Screw tool prevents tangles and clogs.

name: Roomba j9+ Self-Emptying Robot
description: Smart mapping with 3D obstacle avoidance navigation. Auto-empty base holds 60 days of dirt. PrecisionVision navigation avoids pet waste cables and socks. Works with Alexa and Google Assistant. Schedules and customizes cleaning by room.

name: Shark Stratos Robot Vacuum
description: D-shape design reaches corners other robots miss. HEXA Force suction technology. HEPA filter captures 99.97% of dust and allergens. Auto-empty base. Advanced AI home mapping. Wi-Fi connected with app control.

name: PowerSpeed Bagless Upright
description: Multi-cyclone filtration system with washable filter. 12-amp motor for powerful deep cleaning. Scatter-free technology prevents debris from scattering on hard floors. Large 1.8L dirt tank. Swivel steering maneuvers around furniture.

name: Floor One S5 Cordless Wet-Dry
description: iLoop smart sensor automatically adjusts suction power based on dirt level. Vacuums and washes floors simultaneously. 40-minute runtime. Self-cleaning cycle prevents odors. LED display shows suction power and battery life.

name: MacBook Pro 14-inch M3 Pro
description: M3 Pro chip with 12-core CPU and 18-core GPU. 18GB unified memory with 512GB SSD. Liquid Retina XDR ProMotion display. 22-hour battery life. MagSafe 3 charging and three Thunderbolt 4 ports. Best laptop for ML engineers and developers.

name: XPS 15 9530 OLED Touch
description: Intel Core i7-13700H with NVIDIA RTX 4060 8GB GPU. 15.6-inch 3.5K OLED touch display. 32GB DDR5 RAM with 1TB NVMe SSD. Thunderbolt 4 and USB-A ports. Best Windows laptop for video editors and creatives.

name: ThinkPad X1 Carbon Gen 11
description: Intel Core i7-1365U vPro processor. 16GB LPDDR5 soldered RAM. 14-inch 2.8K OLED display. 15-hour battery. Weighs only 1.12kg. MIL-SPEC 810H durability. ThinkShield enterprise security. Best business travel laptop.

name: ROG Zephyrus G14 2024
description: AMD Ryzen 9 8945HS with NVIDIA RTX 4060 8GB. 14-inch QHD+ 165Hz IPS display. 32GB DDR5 with 1TB SSD. AniMe Matrix LED lid panel. 76Wh battery. Best compact gaming and content creation laptop.

name: Chromebook Plus 515
description: Intel Core i3-1215U processor. 8GB RAM with 128GB eMMC SSD. 15.6-inch Full HD IPS touchscreen. 10-hour battery. Google AI writing and photo editing features built in. ChromeOS with Android app support. Best budget laptop for students.

name: WH-1000XM5 Wireless Noise Canceling
description: Industry-leading noise canceling with 8 microphones and QN2e processor. 30-hour battery with quick charge. Multipoint connection for two devices. Ultra-light 250g design. USB-C charging. Foldable for travel. Crystal clear call quality.

name: QuietComfort 45 Wireless
description: Bose TriPort acoustic architecture for balanced sound. 24-hour battery with 15-minute quick charge. Aware Mode with ActiveSense for safe hearing outdoors. USB-C charging. Multipoint pairing. Supremely comfortable memory foam earcups.

name: Momentum 4 Wireless
description: Industry-leading 60-hour battery life. Adaptive noise cancellation. Customizable EQ and sound personalization via Smart Control app. Premium vegan leather construction. Foldable design. Best audiophile wireless headphones.

name: Evolve2 85 Business Headset
description: 37-hour battery with 10-microphone call technology. Professional-grade ANC rated for open offices. UC and Microsoft Teams certified. Kevlar reinforced cable. Comes with USB-A and USB-C Link 380 dongle. Best enterprise wireless headset.

name: Soundcore Q45 Wireless
description: 40-hour battery with hybrid active noise cancellation. Hi-Res Audio certified. Foldable design with carrying case. App support for EQ customization. Multipoint connection. Best budget noise canceling headphones under $80.

name: iPhone 15 Pro 256GB
description: A17 Pro chip with 6-core GPU. Titanium frame with textured matte glass back. Action Button customizable shortcut. 48MP main camera with 5x optical zoom on 6.1-inch model. USB-C with Thunderbolt 3 speeds. ProMotion always-on display.

name: Galaxy S24 Ultra 256GB
description: Snapdragon 8 Gen 3 with titanium frame. Built-in S Pen stylus for note-taking and drawing. 200MP main camera with 100x Space Zoom. 5000mAh battery with 45W fast charging. 7 years of OS and security updates.

name: Pixel 8 Pro 128GB
description: Google Tensor G3 chip with dedicated security core. 50MP wide plus 48MP ultrawide plus 48MP telephoto camera array. 7 years of guaranteed OS updates. Built-in temperature sensor. Magic Eraser Best Take and Call Screen AI features.

name: OnePlus 12 256GB
description: Snapdragon 8 Gen 3 with Hasselblad-tuned triple camera system. 50MP main camera with f/1.6 aperture. 100W SUPERVOOC wired and 50W AIRVOOC wireless charging. 5400mAh battery charges from 0 to 100 in 26 minutes. Classic Alert Slider.

name: iPhone 15 128GB
description: A16 Bionic chip. USB-C replacing Lightning for universal compatibility. Dynamic Island notification system. 48MP main camera with 2x telephoto. Ceramic Shield front glass. Emergency SOS via satellite. Best value iPhone.

name: UltraSharp U2723QE 27" 4K USB-C
description: IPS Black panel technology with 2000:1 contrast ratio. 100% sRGB and 98% DCI-P3 color coverage. USB-C with 90W power delivery charges your laptop. Built-in KVM switch controls two computers with one keyboard and mouse. Ethernet hub included.

name: Odyssey OLED G9 49" Curved
description: 49-inch ultrawide curved OLED panel with infinite contrast. Dual QHD 5120x1440 resolution at 240Hz refresh rate. 0.03ms response time. DisplayHDR True Black 400 certification. Tizen gaming hub with cloud gaming support.

name: 27GP950-B UltraGear 4K 144Hz
description: 27-inch Nano IPS panel with 144Hz 4K refresh rate overclockable to 160Hz. 1ms GtG response time. HDMI 2.1 for console gaming. NVIDIA G-Sync compatible and AMD FreeSync Premium Pro. USB-C connectivity.

name: ProArt PA279CRV 27" 4K
description: 100% sRGB and 100% Rec.709 color space coverage. Factory calibrated with Delta E below 2. USB-C with 96W power delivery and daisy chain support. ASUS ProArt Calibration technology. Full ergonomic adjustability including pivot rotation.

name: M27Q X 27" 240Hz QHD
description: IPS panel with 240Hz refresh rate and 1ms response time. 2560x1440 QHD resolution. KVM switch for multi-device control. USB-C connectivity. HDR400 certification. Tilt swivel and height adjustable stand. Best high refresh rate monitor under $400.

name: iPad Pro 12.9-inch M2 Wi-Fi 256GB
description: M2 chip with 8-core CPU and 10-core GPU. 12.9-inch Liquid Retina XDR ProMotion 120Hz display. Apple Pencil 2 support with hover detection. Thunderbolt and USB4 port. 12MP front camera with Center Stage. Wi-Fi 6E for ultra-fast wireless.

name: Galaxy Tab S9+ 256GB
description: Snapdragon 8 Gen 2 with vapor cooling. 12.4-inch Dynamic AMOLED 120Hz display. IP68 water and dust resistant. S Pen included for note-taking and drawing. Samsung DeX desktop mode. 10090mAh battery with 45W fast charging.

name: Pixel Tablet 128GB with Dock
description: Google Tensor G2 chip. 11-inch LCD display with nano-texture coating. Charging Speaker Dock transforms it into a smart home hub. Google Cast for wireless streaming. 12-hour battery life. Hub mode controls smart home devices.

name: Tab P12 Pro 256GB
description: Snapdragon 870 processor. 12.6-inch AMOLED 120Hz display. Precision Pen 3 included with 4096 pressure levels. Quad JBL speakers with Dolby Atmos. 10200mAh battery rated for 15 hours. Side-mounted fingerprint sensor.

name: Fire HD 10 Plus 32GB
description: 10.1-inch Full HD display. Octa-core 2.0GHz processor. Wireless charging support. Alexa hands-free built-in. 12-hour battery life. Show Mode for smart display features. Best budget tablet for streaming movies and casual use.

name: Apple Watch Series 9 GPS 45mm
description: S9 chip enables Double Tap gesture to control watch without touching screen. Precision Finding locates your iPhone. Always-On Retina display. ECG and blood oxygen monitoring. Crash detection and fall detection. 18-hour battery life.

name: Galaxy Watch 6 Classic 47mm
description: Physical rotating bezel for intuitive navigation. Advanced sleep coaching with sleep score. Body composition analysis using BioActive sensor. Wear OS 4 with Google apps. 40-hour battery. IP68 and 5ATM water resistance.

name: Fenix 7X Sapphire Solar
description: Solar charging lens extends battery life up to 28 days in smartwatch mode. Titanium bezel with sapphire crystal lens. Topographic maps and multi-band GPS. Advanced training metrics including HRV status and Training Readiness. MIL-STD-810 rated.

name: Versa 4 Fitness Smartwatch
description: Built-in GPS tracks outdoor workouts without phone. 6-day battery life. Daily Readiness Score and stress management tools. 40 plus exercise modes with automatic recognition. Google Wallet for contactless payments. Amazon Alexa built-in.

name: Instinct 2S Solar Smartwatch
description: Solar charging panel enables unlimited battery life in solar mode. Rugged fiber-reinforced polymer case. MIL-STD-810 rated for extreme environments. Multi-GNSS satellite systems. Pulse Ox blood oxygen monitoring. 24/7 health and wellness tracking.

name: Era 300 Spatial Audio Speaker
description: Six-driver array for true spatial audio with Dolby Atmos. Automatically tunes to room acoustics with Trueplay. Wi-Fi and Bluetooth connectivity. Line-in for turntable or other sources. Voice microphone array for hands-free control.

name: HomePod 2nd Generation
description: S7 chip with room sensing and spatial audio. Automatically adapts sound to room acoustics. Dolby Atmos support. Temperature and humidity sensor for home automation. Matter smart home standard support. Deep Siri and Apple Music integration.

name: Charge 5 Portable Speaker
description: IP67 waterproof and dustproof for outdoor adventures. 20-hour playtime at maximum volume. Built-in USB-A powerbank charges your devices. PartyBoost connects multiple JBL speakers. USB-C charging with speakerphone capability.

name: Beosound A5 Portable Speaker
description: Aircraft-grade aluminum and solid oak construction. 37-hour battery life with IP65 water and dust resistance. Wi-Fi and Bluetooth 5.1. Spotify Connect AirPlay 2 and Chromecast built-in. Beolink multiroom audio. The finest portable speaker.

name: HW-Q990C Soundbar 11.1.4ch
description: 11.1.4 channel surround sound with 656 total watts. Dolby Atmos and DTS:X object-based audio. Wireless rear speakers and subwoofer included. SpaceFit Sound Pro automatically calibrates to your room. Q-Symphony syncs with Samsung QLED and Neo QLED TVs.
